name: Vegan: Aloo Rasdar
recipeIngredient: Potatoes (6 large), cut into about 6 to 8 chunks each.
Green peas (2 cups), fresh or frozen (the smaller the better).
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the onions and sauté until translucent.
2. Add the green chili peppers and cook for a minute more.
3. Add the tomatoes and peas, stirring occasionally until the tomatoes soften.
4. Stir in the potato chunks and cook on medium heat for about 20 minutes or until all vegetables are tender.
5. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
